settings.heading: Healthier glow, made for you
settings.text: Hush Hush Tan is the customizable spray tan studio behind Austin, Dallas and Houston's most flawless glows. We're known for our masterful airbrush technique and our natural, eco-certified DHA formulas.

settings.heading: Everyone will notice. No one will know.
settings.text: We mix every Custom Glow on the spot to match your unique undertones. The result is a tan that looks like your skin — only better.

settings.heading: Cleaner, kinder, safer.
settings.text: Our solutions are paraben-free, alcohol-free, cruelty-free, and made with eco-certified DHA derived from sugar beets. Safer sunless, every time.

settings.title: Customization
settings.text: Every tan is mixed to your skin.
